## Interested in joining us?

We are always looking for new ECO brands.

Do not hesitate to [contact us!](https://group.eco/contact)

## About us

## Joined 

 Forces

![Image 31](https://group.eco/images/elemente/element-4.svg)

ECO Group is about to unite rising ECO brands under one roof. 

 By doing so we are building an innovative hub and a bigger platform to create synergies and structure for increased growth and profitability within the group companies.

 The network enables us to build scale leveraging individual strengths in different business areas and to pursue our common goal – to create a more sustainable world together.

![Image 32: green dot](https://group.eco/images/elemente/element-4.svg)

## ECO 

products

![Image 33: Bamboo toothbrushes in a glass jar](https://group.eco/templates/yootheme/cache/47/ecofriends-products-47de2485.png)

We are committed to providing consumers ECO friendly, innovative and high-quality ECO products. 

 To us, any product starts being ECO as soon as it is more sustainable than the current standard. Whether it is of certified natural origin, eliminating potentially harmful ingredients, a virgin plastic alternative, compacted and reduced, simply recyclable where the standard is not or all of the above…

To us, this means it is better for us and the planet and we should do all we can to make it replace a standard product.

## For us, sustainability is not a destination – 

it’s a journey, it’s about continuous improvement

[Get in touch](https://group.eco/contact)

## Sustainability is the key

 to a better future
